entity.summary: Georgia-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in March 2018 as a brand of British Capital LLC. BitBegin currently maintains public spot markets, account and identity-verification flows, a mobile application, and exchange information pages.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at month precision because current exchange and app profiles identify March 2018 without a reliable exact public-launch day. The operator relationship to British Capital LLC and Georgia registration follows the official app description and exchange pages.

events.title: BitBegin Exchange launched
events.description: BitBegin began operating in March 2018 as a Georgia-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange associated with British Capital LLC.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker from current exchange and official-app profiles.

evidence.title: BitBegin exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile identifies a March 2018 launch, British Capital LLC relationship, and Georgia registration.

evidence.title: BitBegin Exchange mobile application
evidence.notes: Official app listing describes BitBegin as established in March 2018 under British Capital LLC and licensed in Georgia.

evidence.title: BitBegin official exchange markets
evidence.notes: Current official site displays public spot markets, prices, and exchange access.

evidence.title: BitBegin exchange registration statement
evidence.notes: Official exchange page states that BitBegin is a centralized exchange registered by the Georgia government.
